views.createSql: CREATE VIEW `${VIEW_NAME}` AS SELECT user_id, strftime('%Y-%m-%d', date / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS spend_date, SUM(amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS tx_count FROM transactions WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND UPPER(transaction_type) IN ('SENT', 'AIRTIME', 'PAYBILL', 'BUY_GOODS', 'WITHDRAW', 'PAID', 'WITHDRAWN') GROUP BY user_id, strftime('%Y-%m-%d', date / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')

CREATE VIEW `${VIEW_NAME}` AS SELECT user_id, strftime('%Y-%m', date / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS spend_month, SUM(amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS tx_count FROM transactions WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND UPPER(transaction_type) IN ('SENT', 'AIRTIME', 'PAYBILL', 'BUY_GOODS', 'WITHDRAW', 'PAID', 'WITHDRAWN') GROUP BY user_id, strftime('%Y-%m', date / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
